components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The decisive action for a major conversion point.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 46px; padding: 11px 19px; border: 1px solid #fff; border-radius: 999px; background: #fff; color: #0a0a0a; font: 450 14px/1 Arial, sans-serif; transition: background 180ms, transform 220ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #a0c3ec; border-color: #a0c3ec; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8abff3; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: The canonical secondary action on dark surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { min-height: 46px; padding: 11px 19px; border: 1px solid #6e7075; border-radius: 999px; background: #0a0a0a; color: #fff; font: 450 14px/1 Arial, sans-serif; transition: background 180ms, border-color 180ms; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #111214; border-color: #fff; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8abff3; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Content Panel
components.description: A tight instrument-like surface for selected information.
components.html:
LIVE VERTICAL

Peptide Ads

Conversion-engineered paid media for peptide brands.
components.css: .ds-panel { max-width: 420px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #292b2f; border-radius: 8px; background: #18191b; color: #fff; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-panel small { color: #a0c3ec; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; letter-spacing: .08em; } .ds-panel h3 { margin: 32px 0 12px; font-size: 32px; font-weight: 400; } .ds-panel p { margin: 0; color: #dadbdf; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Compact navigation with monochrome links and one outline action.
components.html: PepMediaDivisionsResultsBook a Call
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; padding: 12px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid #292b2f; background: #0a0a0a; color: #fff; font: 14px Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-nav strong { margin-right: auto; font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav a { color: #dadbdf; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav a:hover { color: #fff; } .ds-nav-cta { padding: 9px 14px; border: 1px solid #6e7075; border-radius: 999px; } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8abff3; outline-offset: 4px; }

narrative.overview: PepMedia uses a near-black research canvas, precise regular-weight typography, sparse signal colors, and visible information architecture to communicate specialist authority. The interface feels engineered rather than advertised.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black edge-to-edge canvas with white as the dominant signal.
Geist Sans for the message and Geist Mono for operational labels.
Flat surfaces, hairline dividers, and 8px content corners.
Outline pills for secondary actions and one filled primary action.
A restrained peptide-network field as the signature visual system.

rules.name: The Sparse Signal Rule
rules.body: Blue and orange together must occupy less than ten percent of any viewport.

rules.name: The Regular Weight Rule
rules.body: Size, placement, and contrast provide hierarchy. Display copy is never bold.

rules.name: The Instrument Rule
rules.body: If a surface cannot be understood without a drop shadow, its boundary and hierarchy are wrong.

dos: Do keep the page surface near-black and continuous.
Do use hairlines, spacing, and type scale to organize dense content.
Do preserve keyboard, touch, and reduced-motion access for every interaction.
Do use the original content and narrative order as the source of truth.
donts: Don't return to the existing neon-gradient agency aesthetic.
Don't build generic SaaS card walls or glassmorphism panels.
Don't use oversized rounded containers, stock wellness photography, or decorative biotech cliches.
Don't mimic xAI branding or logos.
Don't use gradient text, decorative orbs, or shadows on content cards.
